subject: fix(styling): use exact opacity values in Tailwind arbitrary syntax
body:
Fix opacity mismatches from previous refactor where withAlpha() values
were rounded to nearest Tailwind preset:
- 0.12 was rounded to /10 → now /[0.12] (border-base-content)
- 0.08 was rounded to /10 → now /[0.08] (bg-base-content)

Tailwind v4 arbitrary value syntax [0.12] preserves the exact original
opacity instead of rounding to the nearest preset step.

Tags: styling, bugfix
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: theming
Semver: patch
